hero_headlines: Effortless contract tracking for law firms.
hero_subheads: Designed for law firms managing 5-15 contracts monthly.
value_props: User-friendly dashboard tailored for law firms.
Manual entry for precise contract details.
Never miss a renewal with timely reminders.
feature_bullets: Dashboard for easy tracking of 5-15 contracts.
Manual entry option for accurate record-keeping.
Custom reminders to prevent missed deadlines.
Invoice entry form designed for law firms.
Simple interface for busy legal professionals.
